name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, coordinator

TypeOK == /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"idle", "prepared", "aborted", "committed"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborting", "finished"}

Init == /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ coordinator = "idle"

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "preparing"
           /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "prepared"

Commit == /\ coordinator = "committing"
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "committed"

Abort == /\ coordinator = "aborting"
         /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "aborted"

Next == \/ /\ coordinator = "idle" /\ coordinator' = "preparing" /\ UNCHANGED participants
       \/ Prepare /\ coordinator' = "committing" /\ UNCHANGED participants
       \/ Commit /\ coordinator' = "finished" /\ UNCHANGED participants
       \/ Abort /\ coordinator' = "finished" /\ UNCHANGED participants
       \/ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

Left(i) == (i - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

PickUp(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Left(i)] = 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutDown(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
  PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initialization: all numbers zero, all flags false *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: max number among all processes *)
maxNum == Max(Seq(num))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Process i enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[i] = TRUE
       /\ num[i] > 0
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[i] < num[j] \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i < j)
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED num
    \/ (* Process i exits critical section *)
       /\ flag[i] = FALSE
       /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
       /\ UNCHANGED flag
    \/ (* Process i chooses a number *)
       /\ flag[i] = FALSE
       /\ num[i] = 0
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
       /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, num>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: blocks when full *)
Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue a dummy item
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: blocks when empty *)
Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue an item
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ Producer
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, Majority
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor


TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
               /\ currentTerm = currentTerm + 1
               /\ votedFor = currentTerm

VoteGranted == /\ state = "Follower"
               /\ currentTerm = currentTerm
               /\ votedFor = currentTerm

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ VoteGranted

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1 /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers < N
  \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1 /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers > 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers = 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

CHANNELS == {1..N} \ {1}  \* all channels except 1

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, hasn

(* state[p] is the local state of process p: "recorded" or "not recorded" *)
TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"recorded", "not recorded"}] /\
          channel \in [CHANNELS -> Seq({1..N})] /\
          marker \in [CHANNELS -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "not recorded"]
        /\ channel = [c \in CHANNELS |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [c \in CHANNELS |-> FALSE]

(* Process p records its state if it hasn't already *)
Record(p) == /\ state[p] = "not recorded"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recorded"]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>

(* Process p sends a marker on channel c after recording its state *)
SendMarker(p, c) == /\ state[p] = "recorded"
                   /\ marker[c] = FALSE
                   /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], p)]
                   /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
                   /\ UNCHANGED state

(* Process p receives a marker on channel c *)
ReceiveMarker(p, c) == /\ channel[c] /= <<>>
                       /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channel[c])]
                       /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![c] = FALSE]
                       /\ UNCHANGED state

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..N: Record(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..N : \E c \in CHANNELS : SendMarker(p, c)
        \/ \E p \in 1..N : \E c \in CHANNELS : ReceiveMarker(p, c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, msg

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ msg \in {"idle", "sent"}

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ msg = "idle"

Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ msg' = IF token = N THEN "sent" ELSE msg

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, msg>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


TypeOK == /\ Keys \subseteq 1..10
          /\ Values \subseteq 1..10

vars == <<store>>

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(p) == /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
            /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accepted(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M: Prepare(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Promise(a, p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M: Accept(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Accepted(a, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES ackIndex, channel, chunkIndex, file, receiverState, retransmitCount, senderState


TypeOK == 
    senderState \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done"} /\
    receiverState \in {"idle", "receiving"} /\
    file \in Seq(1..N) /\
    chunkIndex \in 0..Len(file) /\
    ackIndex \in 0..Len(file) /\
    retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES /\
    channel \in {"sent", "lost", "ack_sent", "ack_lost"}

Init == 
    /\ senderState = "idle"
    /\ receiverState = "idle"
    /\ file = <<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>  \* Example file
    /\ chunkIndex = 0
    /\ ackIndex = 0
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = "sent"

SendChunk == 
    /\ senderState = "sending"
    /\ chunkIndex < Len(file)
    /\ channel' = CHOOSE c \in {"sent", "lost"}: TRUE
    /\ senderState' = "waiting_ack"
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, ackIndex>>

ReceiveChunk == 
    /\ senderState = "waiting_ack"
    /\ channel = "sent"
    /\ receiverState' = "receiving"
    /\ receiverState = "receiving"
    /\ channel' = "ack_sent"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retransmitCount>>

AckReceived == 
    /\ senderState = "waiting_ack"
    /\ channel = "ack_sent"
    /\ senderState' = "sending"
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
    /\ channel' = "sent"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, ackIndex, retransmitCount>>

Retransmit == 
    /\ senderState = "waiting_ack"
    /\ channel = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ senderState' = "sending"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channel' = "sent"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex>>

GiveUp == 
    /\ senderState = "waiting_ack"
    /\ channel = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ senderState' = "done"
    /\ channel' = "sent"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retransmitCount>>

Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ ReceiveChunk
    \/ AckReceived
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retransmitCount, channel>>

====
